EdgeSpec.description:
One edge in the compiled `StateGraph`.

`condition` (optional) names a callable in the condition-function registry
(`app.manifest.conditions`). Slab 1 stub registry exposes only
`"always_true"` and `"always_false"`; full dispatch registry is Slab 3.

`dispatch_envelope` is the Slab 3 dispatch-shape pointer (trailing `...` from
AC-1.4-A). Slab 1 accepts any dict payload; Slab 3 narrows to `SpecialistEnvelope`.

`decision_card_schema` is an additive Slab 3 pointer to the Pydantic model
that an interrupting gate emits. It uses `<module>:<ClassName>` dotted-ref
syntax and is compile-time validated by `app.manifest.refs.resolve_dotted_ref`.

`from_node` is aliased to the YAML/JSON key `"from"` because `from` is a
Python reserved word and cannot be a field name directly.

from.description: Source node id (LangGraph convention: `__start__` marks graph entry).
from.title: From

to.description: Target node id (LangGraph convention: `__end__` marks graph exit).
to.title: To

condition.description: Optional condition-function name. Presence triggers `add_conditional_edges`; absence triggers `add_edge`. Resolved at compile time against the condition registry.
condition.title: Condition

dispatch_envelope.description: Slab 3 dispatch envelope payload. Slab 1 accepts arbitrary dicts; Slab 3 narrows the shape to `SpecialistEnvelope`.
dispatch_envelope.title: Dispatch Envelope

decision_card_schema.description: Optional `<module>:<ClassName>` dotted reference naming the DecisionCard subclass emitted at this edge's gate boundary.
decision_card_schema.title: Decision Card Schema

EdgeSpec.title: EdgeSpec

LearningEventsConfig.description:
Top-level learning-event wiring (Epic 33 substrate).

Carries the `schema_ref` pointer the primary-repo v4.2 manifest uses at its
top level. Per-step emissions live on `NodeSpec.learning_events` via
`StepLearningEventsConfig`.

schema_ref.description: Path (repo-relative) to the learning-event schema YAML.
schema_ref.title: Schema Ref

LearningEventsConfig.title: LearningEventsConfig

NodeSpec.description:
One node in the compiled `StateGraph`.

Architecture-canonical fields: `id`, `specialist_id`, `scaffold_node`,
`model_config_ref`. v4.2 inventory deltas ride under the explicit
extensibility trailing from AC-1.4-A: `label`, `gate`, `gate_code`,
`sub_phase_of`, `insertion_after`, `hud_tracked`, `pack_section_anchor`,
`pack_version`, `rationale`, `learning_events`.

specialist_id.description: Specialist identifier the compiler resolves to a callable. Slab 1 uses a passthrough stub; full resolution is Slab 2 Story 2a.1 scope.
specialist_id.title: Specialist Id

scaffold_node.description: Which scaffold-node slot (of the 9-node specialist scaffold) this node represents. Slab 2 concept; optional in Slab 1.
scaffold_node.title: Scaffold Node

model_config_ref.description: Repo-relative path to a `model_config.yaml` file. Compiler validates presence at compile time (NFR-M2 / FR25). `None` skips the lint pass.
model_config_ref.title: Model Config Ref

dependencies.description: Manifest-declared dependency map for production composition. Keys are downstream specialist input keys; values are upstream specialist ids. Missing or empty maps use the runner's permanent fallback resolution. Delivers the WHOLE upstream output dict under the input key — for granular consumers use dependency_projections instead.
dependencies.title: Dependencies

dependency_projections.description: Edge-level key projection (party review 2026-06-12, Winston Deviation-2 ruling: projection, not spread). Keys are downstream consumer input keys; values name the producer specialist and the producer OUTPUT key to project. Projected input keys are validated against the consumer's CONSUMED_PAYLOAD_KEYS by the Ratchet-D contract test; governed by data_plane_vocabulary_version.
dependency_projections.title: Dependency Projections

fold_with.description: Gate code for an upstream/surfaced pause point this node folds into. Mutually exclusive with fold_target.
fold_with.title: Fold With

fold_target.description: Named subgraph target for compile-time folding. Mutually exclusive with fold_with.
fold_target.title: Fold Target

gate.description: Whether this step is a HIL gate (v4.2 manifest).
gate.title: Gate

sub_phase_of.description: Parent step id for nested sub-phases (v4.2 manifest).
sub_phase_of.title: Sub Phase Of

insertion_after.description: Prior step id for linear-chain ordering (v4.2 manifest). Story 1.6 synthesizes `EdgeSpec` entries from this field when migrating the real v4.2 manifest.
insertion_after.title: Insertion After

rationale.description: Free-text rationale (stored verbatim; NO min_length per checklist §6).
rationale.title: Rationale

NodeSpec.title: NodeSpec

ProjectionSpec.description: One projected key on a dependency edge: producer output key -> consumer input key.

from.description: Producer specialist id (canonical or manifest spelling).
from.title: From

key.description: Key inside the producer's contribution output to project.
key.title: Key

ProjectionSpec.title: ProjectionSpec

StepLearningEventsConfig.description: Per-node learning-event emission metadata (v4.2 inventory delta).

emits.description: Whether this node emits learning events at runtime.
emits.title: Emits

event_types.description: Event-type strings this node may emit (open-set; validated by capture layer).
event_types.title: Event Types

schema_ref.description: Optional per-node override of the top-level learning-event schema_ref.
schema_ref.title: Schema Ref

StepLearningEventsConfig.title: StepLearningEventsConfig

description:
The manifest-as-graph-config root shape.

Loaded by `app.manifest.loader.load()` from YAML; compiled by
`app.manifest.compiler.compile()` into a LangGraph `StateGraph` (one per
`lane`). Architecture-canonical fields + v4.2 inventory deltas are unified
here per the Winston/Amelia 2026-04-22 amendment.

lane.description: D4 lane identity (`run_graph` for Marcus runtime; `dev_graph` for Cora).
lane.title: Lane

entrypoint.description: Node id that starts the graph. Must match a `nodes[].id` OR the LangGraph sentinel `__start__` (edges from `__start__` then name the real entry node).
entrypoint.title: Entrypoint

frozen_graph_version.description: Frozen-graph version identifier (e.g., 'v0.1-stub', 'v42'). Compiler asserts `runtime/graphs/v{version}/` exists at compile time. Full ceremony (Slab 4 Story 4.5).
frozen_graph_version.title: Frozen Graph Version

data_plane_vocabulary_version.description: Versioned home for the manifest's data-plane vocabulary (dependencies + dependency_projections) — Winston S1-B, party review 2026-06-12: pack_version provably does not govern the data plane (regime doc, determination 2026-06-12). Tier-2 governance for vocabulary changes attaches HERE: bump requires party-mode consensus, like a pack bump but for edges.
data_plane_vocabulary_version.title: Data Plane Vocabulary Version

nodes.description: All graph nodes. Must be non-empty; node ids must be unique.
nodes.title: Nodes

edges.description: Explicit edges. For the v4.2 migration, Story 1.6 synthesizes these from per-node `insertion_after`. Empty is legal (graph with just an entrypoint and no transitions).
edges.title: Edges

pack_version.description: Prompt-pack version identifier (e.g., 'v4.2'). Distinct from `frozen_graph_version` (LangGraph compiled-graph identity).
pack_version.title: Pack Version

generator_ref.description: Repo-relative path to the generator script (pipeline-manifest regime).
generator_ref.title: Generator Ref

block_mode_trigger_paths.description: Paths whose modification triggers pipeline-manifest regime block-mode review.
block_mode_trigger_paths.title: Block Mode Trigger Paths

title: PipelineManifest
